title: NotEnoughOrigins
description: Origins addon that adds more origins into the original mod and adds some custom items
body:
![This is an image](https://i.postimg.cc/htXwHrP5/curseforge-banner.png) 
## **Required Dependencies**

![This is an image](https://i.postimg.cc/kDrLSW-Xf/fabric.png)![This is an image](https://i.postimg.cc/wBfqmbK2/origins.png)![This is an image](https://i.postimg.cc/fbrsLtXg/pehkui.png)

## **Description**
> Choose an Origin and begin your game with special abilities, some of which help you out, while others hinder you in your gameplay.

> This mod adds game-changing stuff such as Pine trees (can be crafted to doors, sign, etc), Iridium Ore (armor and tools) and more.

## **Currently featuring 6 Origins (+ Cretacean):**
![This is an image](https://i.postimg.cc/JnYC5tg4/origins.png)
